name: variant-dump
description: Comprehensive adaptation and coding extraction — dumps all known per3 car-function, car-device, and CAN-assignment addresses to a structured SD card report. Read-only.
author: dspl1236
scripts: variant_dump.sh - Dump all 90+ per3 adaptation addresses and decode
decodes: Car Device list (0x00100000-0x0010003F) — installed feature flags
CAN Bus assignment (0x0014003D-0x00140098) — Komfort vs Dashboard routing
notes: Inspired by the 'Adaptations' and 'VariantInfo' screens in jilleb/mib2-toolbox. MIB2 uses BAP/UDS adaptation channels. MMI3G uses the per3 namespace directly, so this module reads per3 addresses via the GEM keyValue system (requires GEM activated + a booted MMI). Output is a labeled table of what each address reported.
credits: Concept from jilleb/mib2-toolbox Adaptations/VariantInfo screens. Uses per3 address map documented in research/PER3_ADDRESS_MAP.md.
